eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 3:49 PM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 11:49 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A safe Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Phoenix Police Department is looking for 67-year-old Alfredo Espinoza-Valdez. Alfredo is a Hispanic male 5 feet tall, 100 pounds, with green eyes and black hair. Alfredo was last seen wearing a gray t-shirt and blue jeans. Alfredo was last seen on 07/16/2026 at 8:30 A.M. on foot near North 19th Avenue and West Glendale Avenue. Alfredo suffers from a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused. Please call 911 with information. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
